description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the dcurylo/fsharp-mono-netcore:2.1.301 Docker image. Define two stages: build and deploy. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, executes apt-get update && apt-get install -y gnupg2, curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_10.x | bash -, apt-get update && apt-get install -y nodejs, curl -sS https://dl.yarnpkg.com/debian/pubkey.gpg | apt-key add -, echo \"deb https://dl.yarnpkg.com/debian/ stable main\" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list, apt-get update && apt-get install -y yarn, and ./fake.sh build -t Build; it stores the output directory as an artifact and runs only on the master branch. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes rm -rf ./public and mv output public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and also runs only on the master branch.
